title: ficus variegata var. garciae
intro: Ficus variegata var. garciae, also known as Garcia's ficus or Bataan ficus, is a species of tree in the fig family (Moraceae) that is native to the Philippines. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ficus variegata var. garciae include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and prevent the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
